/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALLBE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS INPLACE/X:AS CONDITIONS OF RELEASE,,,/CTORD:CURFEW 8PM TO 6AM/WS/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW/LDPX:12-21-21/X:TIME ESTIMATE ONE HOUR/X:60TH DAY 02-07-22/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
